title: taraxacum voricola
intro: Taraxacum voricola, commonly known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum voricola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Taraxacum voricola can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
